reasoning_content: Let me try a different approach - use sed to add null checks.

action.command:
sed -i 's/for (auto&& stmt : obj->subs)/for (auto\&\& stmt : obj->subs) {\n    if (stmt) {/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp
sed -i 's/self(stmt);/self(stmt);\n    }/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp
